nasb.text: Now because we are in the service of the palace, and it is not fitting for us to see the king’s dishonor, therefore we have sent and informed the king,

esv.text: Now because we eat the salt of the palace and it is not fitting for us to witness the king’s dishonor, therefore we send and inform the king,

cnv.text: 現在我們既食王家的鹽，不該見王受剝奪，因此上奏稟告王，

ccb.text: 我们既食王禄，就不能坐视王遭受损失，因此上奏于王。
